summary: Average recording with a highlight of Uncle John’s Band.
review: The two fan comments give very little detail about the audio source, leaving the technical quality uncertain and likely only fair. The show is noted for an enjoyable rendition of “Uncle John’s Band,” but no other musical moments or performance issues are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews, one modestly positive (3★) and one essentially negative (0★); no concrete recording details, so rating is weighted toward an average show with unknown audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on soundboard clarity, mix balance, or audience ambience; cannot assess technical quality beyond being unremarkable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No commentary on set structure or pacing was provided.
